reviews.review_description: When I got the game, I thought it would be fun, but when I tried doing the rubik's cube, I had to pay $1. So then I try to play another game. I had to pay another dollar and it turns out you had to pay a dollar for almost all of them.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for trying the game and for sharing your feedback 😊

There may have been a misunderstanding about how the game works. Our app includes many different mini-games, with plenty of free content to enjoy, and there is no system where players need to make separate purchases for each game.

Please reach out to us at wase2716@gmail.com and we’ll be happy to help resolve the issue right away 💛

developer_response.body:
Hey ItsDash, 
Actually, we've been expanding fast! The free content in the game is getting bigger every day. Grab the latest update and jump back in—there is plenty to do for free, and we’re adding more all the time. Hope you’ll reconsider your review once you see the changes!

developer_response.body: Hey NacoBeliclrdtx, thanks for reaching out! Just to clear the air: none of our SFX are copied from other games. We take pride in our original audio. Hope that changes your perspective, we’d appreciate it if you could update your review. Thanks for playing!

developer_response.body:
Hi remlap2021! 
We totally get wanting to dive into the fun! Our free content is getting bigger and bigger every day. We’re constantly adding new, free ways to enjoy the game. Please update and check it out again—we hope you find plenty of free fun to enjoy!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! It sounds like there might be a misunderstanding—we offer a variety of games that are totally free. In fact, our free-to-play side is growing all the time! Please grab the latest update and take another look; we’re confident you can have a blast without spending a dime.

reviews.review_description: this game is horrible you have to pay $1 in order to access literally almost every game not only that but you can't even move out of your boundary would not recommend it's horrible
Game only comes with 3 basic block style games. You have to pay a dollar for anything else. Hand tracking is sub par on my quest 3. Kinda boring

Listen I’m not gonna say this game sucks necessarily but I am gonna say that I don’t like it the reason I got the game is google reccomended it so I tried it and I don’t like it I mean the throwing sucks (that may just be me) and in painting you can’t erase the paint and I wasted a dollar on this so please do not even try this game and you only get one game without paying a dollar

developer_response.body:
Hi Kjsworld0412,

Sorry you had a bad experience. I really appreciate you trying the game and sharing your thoughts. I'm constantly working to make it better.

Just for you, I updated the Paint game in version 0.2.0.11! It’s now more polished, includes an erase tool, and offers new color pens. Please make sure to update the game :)

Also, I’m currently working on improving the throwing mechanics with enhanced hand tracking, that’s coming in a future update.

I hope you’ll consider updating your review after checking out the latest version.

– Developer 💙

reviews.review_description: This game was fun and enjoyable some people might not agree with me but this includes hand tracking and it’s fun❤️😆
I love this game s idk why people are having but stop having they tried

Not sure why this has such a low rating. I've owned this one for quite some time and have always had fun experimenting with the Hand Tracking. Would love to see Quest Achievements integrated for completing the levels though.

developer_response.body:
Hi M4cheteColletti,

Thank you so much for your kind words and support! I'm really glad to hear you've enjoyed experimenting with the Hand Tracking. It's awesome to know it's been fun for you. 😊

As for Quest Achievements, that's a great suggestion! It's definitely something I’d love to explore further, and I’ll be adding it to my development backlog for future updates. Stay tuned, and thanks again for playing!

reviews.review_description: Just make it free
Before, I could do anything in this game, but now, I need to play dor placing dominoes and I really think that's a scam. I see so much potential in this game, they just have to do it right.

developer_response.body:
Hi Changito.2014,

I'm really sorry to hear you're feeling that way. That’s definitely not the experience I want anyone to have with the game. I’d love to understand more about what changed and what’s not working for you, especially around placing dominoes, so I can look into it and make it right.

I truly appreciate you seeing the potential in the game, and I’m committed to improving it. Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts!

developer_response.body:
Hi ouovr,

Thanks for sharing your thoughts, and I’m sorry to hear the game didn’t meet your expectations at the time. Since then, I’ve released several updates with new content and improvements based on player feedback.

It would mean a lot if you gave it another try and if you feel differently now, I’d really appreciate it if you considered updating your review. 

Thanks again for taking the time to leave feedback!

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

We currently offer 8 different mini-games inside the app, with more being added regularly. We appreciate feedback, but we kindly ask that you share accurate information.

If you're experiencing any issues, please feel free to reach out to us at wase2716@gmail.com —we’d be happy to help!

Thanks for your time.

reviews.review_description: It wouldn’t let me use my hands

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Sorry to hear that you had a problem with hand controller. 

The game 100% supports hand tracking on Quest 2,3 and Pro. After lauching the game please put both controllers away and show your hands to the device camera. It will automatically detect your hands. 

Feel free to reach us on wase2716@gmail.com for further information. We will gladly help :)
